---
title: ""
page-layout: article
toc: false
title-block-style: none
---

::: {.hero}
# Laura Burnett

[Data Scientist | Neuroscience PhD]{.subtitle}

::: {.bio}
[TODO: Add 2-3 sentences positioning yourself. Example framing: "I build data pipelines, interactive dashboards, and computational tools for scientific research. With X years of experience turning complex biological datasets into actionable insights, I'm seeking data science roles in industry where I can apply my skills in pipeline engineering, statistical analysis, and data visualization."]
:::
:::
